channel.title: Configuration on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Configuration on Pi Stack

item.title: Apollo vs Nacos vs Consul KV: Best Self-Hosted Configuration Management 2026
item.description: When you are running dozens or hundreds of microservices, managing configuration through environment variables and scattered config files becomes unmanageable. You need a centralized configuration management system that supports dynamic updates, version control, namespace isolation, and audit trails — all running on your own infrastructure.
